description: Executive Order 14179 — Removing Barriers to American Leadership in Artificial Intelligence. Signed January 23, 2025, revoking EO 14110 (Biden-era safety-focused order). Shifts to deregulatory, innovation-first posture.

revokes.title: Safe, Secure, and Trustworthy Development and Use of Artificial Intelligence

sections.title: Purpose
sections.description: America must lead the world in AI to promote human flourishing, economic competitiveness, and national security.

sections.title: Policy
sections.description: Sustain and enhance America's global AI dominance. AI systems should be free from ideological bias or engineered social agendas.

sections.title: Definition
sections.description: Adopts AI definition from 15 U.S.C. 9401(3) — the National AI Initiative Act.

sections.title: Action Plan Development
sections.description: Within 180 days, develop AI action plan addressing AI model development, data centers, energy, workforce, regulation, national security, and international cooperation.

sections.title: Order Revocation Implementation
sections.description: Agencies must identify prior actions under EO 14110 that conflict with new policy, then suspend, revise, or rescind them.

sections.title: General Provisions
sections.description: Standard provisions on implementation, funding, and legal authority.

actionPlan.title: Winning the Race: America's AI Action Plan
pillars: Lead in International AI Diplomacy and Security

keyShifts: Removes dual-use foundation model reporting requirements from EO 14110
Eliminates safety benchmarks and red-team testing mandates
Shifts from safety guardrails to deregulatory, innovation-first approach
Focuses on competitiveness and national security over risk mitigation
Calls for AI free from ideological bias
